---
title: "Xiaolin Wu — STA 9750 Website"
---

# Welcome!

Hi, my name is Xiaolin Wu.\
This website hosts my submission materials for **STA 9750 at Baruch College**.

I am currently a graduate student with interests in data analytics and urban design.\
Here, you’ll find my course projects, assignments, and reflections.

-   📄 [My Resume](https://example.com/resume.pdf)\
-   📧 Contact: xiaolin.wu1\@baruchmail.cuny.edu
